content.en:
Outside.

All forces are preparing, and the integration of the two universes is both an opportunity and a crisis.

If one is not careful, even a first-class supreme like the Lord of the Yuan Gu will fall, but if the opportunity is enough, the cosmic gods and masters may be expected to rise to the sky and step into a higher level.

And the Terrans are also preparing, Ye Tian does not return, and the Supremes of the Terrans are also very convened, but they are still preparing for the new era after the fusion of the two universes.

During this period of time, these Terran Supremes did everything they could to improve their strength, and at the same time vigorously cultivated the geniuses of the Terran Race, and countless resources were almost unlimited.

Resources are called resources when they are useful, and if the Terrans are destroyed, then resources are not resources.

Therefore, they must turn their resources into the strength of the Terrans, and the stronger the Terrans, the stronger their luck, so that they can gain some initiative in the next competition.

Of course, they all knew very well that the real reliance of the human race was Ye Tian.

If Ye Tian is here, the human race will prosper, and if Ye Tian is falling, the human race will decline at any time.

It's not a joke, it's true.

Because at this time, even the Protoss and the Demon Race were very panicked, and they were afraid of the arrival of the unknown.

The first god lord of the Protoss is only a second-class supreme, and there must be a first-class supreme in the other universe, and the lords of the Yuan Gu dare to kill the supreme of the same universe, and the supreme of the other universe naturally dares to kill the supreme of this universe.

Therefore, the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord were very afraid, afraid of being killed by the First Order Supremes.

Although the First Divine Lord and Ye Tian agreed that Ye Tian would help the Protoss once, the First Divine Lord naturally could not rely on Ye Tian completely, so the First Divine Lord and the Demon Clan also secretly united.

They even exchanged their secret techniques, Dao, and chances, wanting to use this general trend to impact the first-class supreme realm, even if they couldn't step into the ranks of first-class supremes, they could jointly resist foreign enemies.

With their background, there is also hope for confronting the weaker first-class supremes.

It's really not good, the first god lord can completely hide in the god realm, and the divine array arranged by the god clan for countless years plus the luck of the god clan is enough to make the first-class supreme unable to attack the god realm.

......

All the clans were preparing, and Ye Tian was still cultivating in the Chaos God Realm.

In a flash, 30,000 years have passed.

"The second layer of the Xuanxuan Jue is complete, my physical body is stronger, but the strength still hasn't skyrocketed, but it is very difficult for the Xuanxu Jue to step into the third layer at once. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And in the past 30,000 years, he has not been cultivating the Xuanxuan Technique, and he has not let go of other aspects of cultivation.

For example, the top supernatural power - the Great Immortal Technique!

He has the inheritance of the Great Immortal Technique, and he also has the Immortal Divine Gold, which is only short of the fusion talent of God-level defense talent and god-level destruction talent - Immortal Talent!

For others, the defense talent and the destruction talent have nothing to do with each other, and there is no way to fuse, but Ye Tian's copy talent can forcibly fuse these two talents.

As a result, Ye Tian used the replication talent to forcibly fuse the god-level defense talent and the god-level destruction talent, and the god-level immortal talent was born.

With the god-level immortal talent, the inheritance of the Great Immortal Technique, and the Immortal Divine Gold, Ye Tian completely possessed the conditions for cultivating the Great Immortal Technique, so he also began to cultivate the Great Immortal Technique in the past 30,000 years.

The Great Immortal Technique is ranked 26th in the chaos of the top great supernatural power, this supernatural power can be imagined how rebellious it is, and it can even be said that it is difficult to cultivate.

But what is really difficult to cultivate in the Great Immortal Technique is its conditions, people who can meet the cultivation conditions are too rare, and even great beings may not be able to cultivate such a descendant who can cultivate the Great Immortal Technique.

Once the conditions are met, it is still difficult to cultivate, but it is not too difficult to just get started.

Ye Tian's talent was already very good, so he had already practiced the Great Immortal Technique.

Airplanes!

An inextinguishable light appeared from Ye Tian's body, and his body was like an indestructible body, even a blow from a two-star god general would be difficult to kill him.

"It's a pity that it's only the Great Immortal Immortal Technique that I have started, if I practice the Great Immortal Technique to the consummation realm, even if my combat power is at the level of a one-star god general, it is estimated that seven or eight star god generals will not be able to kill me in one blow!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

But he also knew very well how difficult it was for a top supernatural power ranked 26th in Chaos to cultivate it to the consummation realm, and it could even be said that there was no hope.

"The Great Destruction Technique has not yet been cultivated, the Great Destruction Technique and the Destruction Dark Gold have already arrived, and there is only one god-level Annihilation Talent left. The Annihilation talent is a necessary talent for some supernatural powers such as the Great Destruction Technique and the Great Annihilation Technique. And the Annihilation Talent is a fusion talent of the Strength Talent and the Destruction Talent, my Destruction Talent is used to fuse the Defense Talent into an Indestructible Talent, normal people can't practice the Great Destruction Technique anymore, but I can copy another god-level Destruction Talent, and it is too difficult for others to get another Destruction Talent!" Ye Tian said darkly.

There are quite a few god-level destruction talents of the Ox Human Clan, so Ye Tian easily copied a god-level destruction talent, and then began to fuse it with the god-level extreme strength talent.

In the time-accelerated environment, the fusion talent is completed, and the god-level annihilation talent is born!

Then, Ye Tian began to comprehend and cultivate the Great Destruction Technique again.

The Great Destruction Technique is an attack on the Great Divine Power, and once practiced, his strength will inevitably skyrocket.

Keep practicing!

Ye Tian didn't leave in a hurry, anyway, the cultivation environment here was very good.

In addition to the water of the turbulent sea that can temper the body, Niu Ryu also brings some top-level elixirs that can temper his divine power, body and soul from time to time, so his strength increases rapidly.

If he was in the outside world, he wouldn't be able to improve his strength!

If the one-star god will be specifically divided into combat power, divided into the early stage, middle stage, late stage and peak of the one-star god general, then when he first came out of the temple, he was in the early stage of the one-star god general.

And in just tens of thousands of years, he has already entered the middle stage of a one-star god general, and is even expected to enter the late stage, and his combat power is much stronger than at the beginning!

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already cultivated the Great Destruction Technique to the entry level, and had also thoroughly practiced the eighth form of the Tiangang Battle Technique.

As for the Void Heaven Diagram, he hadn't yet gone to enlightenment.

After all, what he needs now is to improve his strength, not to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram, and when his strength is difficult to improve, he will slowly comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram.

this day.

Ye Tian is out of customs.

"The Xuanxuan Technique is too difficult to cultivate, and there is still no breakthrough. There are indeed a lot of good things in the Chaos God Realm, but they haven't gone out for a long time, and there are not many supplies here, and there are still very few good things that are really helpful to the god generals, otherwise the Ox Race will not be the strongest only three-star god general......s!

"And my current combat power - the late stage of the one-star god general, is only one step away from the peak of the one-star god general, it's time to leave the chaos god realm, the dual universe is estimated to be almost completely connected, the powerhouse of the other universe is about to come, and the human race needs me!"

Ye Tian stepped out of the sea of turbulent waves in one step.

Niu Ryu sensed Ye Tian's exit and hurriedly came.

Seeing that Ye Tian had just ascended to the aura that had not been completely covered, his expression was immediately shocked.

"I'm about to step into the peak of a one-star god general, how can I ????"

Ushiru felt incredible.

After the one-star god general, which step of improvement is not calculated in millions of years, the original Yuntan Heavenly Monarch has spent at least 10 million years from the early stage of the one-star god general to the peak of the one-star god general, and how long has Ye Tian been cultivating?

"It's too rebellious, I'm no longer his opponent, it's only been tens of thousands of years, and the little guy who could barely dodge my blow at the beginning is now stronger than me!"

Ushiru was so devastated.

"Ushiru, I'm leaving!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Your Highness be careful, the outside world is about to be unpeaceful, and we can't go out, if you really encounter a crisis, try to hide, and when the fog area is opened, Your Highness can enter the Chaos God Realm!"

Ushiru reminded.

"Thanks for the reminder!"

Ye Tiandao.

But he wouldn't really do that, and if that happened one day, it would mean that the Terrans were at an end.

Wow!

Ye Tian used his constant light supernatural power and instantly rushed out of the Chaos God Realm.

It was now time for the Fog Zone to open, so he could easily leave, or he wouldn't have chosen this time to leave.

A moment later.

The Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws has returned, and the human race is overjoyed!
